records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? This silence...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? This silence...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? This silence...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ha, are you a telepath too, Senior of Lotus?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ha, are you a telepath too, Senior of Lotus?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ha, are you a telepath too, Senior of Lotus?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-who are you calling a telepath?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-who are you calling a telepath?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-who are you calling a telepath?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what does it matter if you're Mi Rinae or whatever?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what does it matter if you're Mi Rinae or whatever?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what does it matter if you're Mi Rinae or whatever?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Goodness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Goodness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Goodness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That eardrum-busting reaction fits the sensitive personality I heard about. You really are the Senior of Lotus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That eardrum-busting reaction fits the sensitive personality I heard about. You really are the Senior of Lotus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That eardrum-busting reaction fits the sensitive personality I heard about. You really are the Senior of Lotus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lemme reintroduce myself. I'm Mi Rinae, here at Teach's request.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lemme reintroduce myself. I'm Mi Rinae, here at Teach's request.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lemme reintroduce myself. I'm Mi Rinae, here at Teach's request.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Teach...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Teach...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Teach...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, if someone shows up at this hour, isn't it obvious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, if someone shows up at this hour, isn't it obvious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, if someone shows up at this hour, isn't it obvious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Orders from the Supreme Administrator?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Orders from the Supreme Administrator?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Orders from the Supreme Administrator?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected. Teach said you were a genius, and you are quick on the uptake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected. Teach said you were a genius, and you are quick on the uptake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected. Teach said you were a genius, and you are quick on the uptake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. I'd just arrived at Amani Valley when I was told to hurry here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. I'd just arrived at Amani Valley when I was told to hurry here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. I'd just arrived at Amani Valley when I was told to hurry here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, take this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, take this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, take this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A golden skull.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A golden skull.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A golden skull.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "That, I'll explain."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "That, I'll explain."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "That, I'll explain."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "My name is Sita Khan. I am the new Senior of Campamento."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "My name is Sita Khan. I am the new Senior of Campamento."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "My name is Sita Khan. I am the new Senior of Campamento."

records.m_Talk_ENG: The new Senior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The new Senior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The new Senior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, which of you is the Senior then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, which of you is the Senior then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, which of you is the Senior then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why does the little one start talking and you finish for her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why does the little one start talking and you finish for her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why does the little one start talking and you finish for her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it is me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it is me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it is me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* We're short on time, so I'll let it slide.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* We're short on time, so I'll let it slide.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* We're short on time, so I'll let it slide.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those golden remains are...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those golden remains are...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those golden remains are...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Those golden remains are the Golden Vale's Legacy my grandfather searched for all his life."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Those golden remains are the Golden Vale's Legacy my grandfather searched for all his life."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Those golden remains are the Golden Vale's Legacy my grandfather searched for all his life."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your grandfather? Do you mean Grandpa Khan...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your grandfather? Do you mean Grandpa Khan...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your grandfather? Do you mean Grandpa Khan...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As for what happened in Campamento...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As for what happened in Campamento...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As for what happened in Campamento...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's how it went.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's how it went.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's how it went.

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-excuse me, may I have some water?
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-excuse me, may I have some water?
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-excuse me, may I have some water?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see... Grandpa Khan's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see... Grandpa Khan's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see... Grandpa Khan's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He was overly outgoing and a bit much at times, but he was truly a good person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He was overly outgoing and a bit much at times, but he was truly a good person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He was overly outgoing and a bit much at times, but he was truly a good person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So those remains he found are an Artifact that stabilizes space, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So those remains he found are an Artifact that stabilizes space, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So those remains he found are an Artifact that stabilizes space, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* So he actually found a place most thought existed only in imagination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* So he actually found a place most thought existed only in imagination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* So he actually found a place most thought existed only in imagination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that foolish old man pulled it off, there is no reason I can't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that foolish old man pulled it off, there is no reason I can't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that foolish old man pulled it off, there is no reason I can't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew, thank goodness. Everyone's safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew, thank goodness. Everyone's safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew, thank goodness. Everyone's safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alex? What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alex? What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alex? What brings you here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about the defense line at ARC-EX?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about the defense line at ARC-EX?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about the defense line at ARC-EX?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We bought enough time for all citizens to evacuate, and we recovered the target amount of Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We bought enough time for all citizens to evacuate, and we recovered the target amount of Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We bought enough time for all citizens to evacuate, and we recovered the target amount of Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it seems the Demon Lord was aiming for this very situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it seems the Demon Lord was aiming for this very situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it seems the Demon Lord was aiming for this very situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The simultaneous raids on the reconstruction cities were a plan to lure us away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The simultaneous raids on the reconstruction cities were a plan to lure us away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The simultaneous raids on the reconstruction cities were a plan to lure us away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They predicted we would set up defense lines and tried to remove variables in advance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They predicted we would set up defense lines and tried to remove variables in advance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They predicted we would set up defense lines and tried to remove variables in advance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the raid on the Direct Control City happened at the same time as ARC-EX.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So the raid on the Direct Control City happened at the same time as ARC-EX.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So the raid on the Direct Control City happened at the same time as ARC-EX.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We managed to repel it somehow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We managed to repel it somehow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We managed to repel it somehow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't that mean we thwarted their plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't that mean we thwarted their plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't that mean we thwarted their plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There must be something more that we haven't even considered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There must be something more that we haven't even considered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There must be something more that we haven't even considered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they are willing to break the Qliphoth Game rules, their objective is very certain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they are willing to break the Qliphoth Game rules, their objective is very certain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they are willing to break the Qliphoth Game rules, their objective is very certain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-everyone, we have a problem!
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-everyone, we have a problem!
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-everyone, we have a problem!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something like tree roots is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something like tree roots is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something like tree roots is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tree roots?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tree roots?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tree roots?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* So it finally showed up here too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* So it finally showed up here too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* So it finally showed up here too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know what it is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know what it is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know what it is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know the details.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know the details.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know the details.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only know it swallowed Campamento and accelerated the Corruption Disaster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only know it swallowed Campamento and accelerated the Corruption Disaster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only know it swallowed Campamento and accelerated the Corruption Disaster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, steel yourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, steel yourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, steel yourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What appears from now on won't be ordinary C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What appears from now on won't be ordinary C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What appears from now on won't be ordinary C.O.s.
